case_title: RADOCY MARY PAT, CSR et al VS MOSS ALAN, ATTORNEY AT LAW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,392.35 FILED BY RADOCY MARY PAT, CSR MP RADOCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS ALAN,  ATTORNEY AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADOCY MARY PAT, CSR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSS ALAN,  ATTORNEY AT LAW $1,392.35 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,420.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS ALAN,  ATTORNEY AT LAW
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS ALAN,  ATTORNEY AT LAW HEARING SET FOR SEP-30-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSS ALAN,  ATTORNEY AT LAW HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: AUG-24-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS ALAN,  ATTORNEY AT LAW
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-15-1992, DENIED

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-14-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS ALAN,  ATTORNEY AT LAW
